summary: Successfully implemented all 6 CLI thread commands for the YCB Content Layer. Created comprehensive CLI at N5/scripts/n5_content_cli.py with proper argument parsing, error handling, and tree visualization. All commands tested end-to-end with real data including nested comment hierarchies.
learnings: Tree rendering algorithm needed careful handling of parent-child relationships and proper indentation for nested structures
SQLite CASCADE DELETE automatically handles child comment deletion when parent is deleted - reduces complexity
argparse subcommands provide clean CLI structure matching existing N5 script patterns
Error handling for invalid IDs, missing threads, etc. returns proper exit codes for script integration
Thread update timestamps automatically maintained when comments are added via existing schema triggers
